zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Luttrel於1523年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親Andrew Luttrell26歲，母親Lady Margaret Wyndham22歲。她於大約1542年與Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年3月10日在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特布陽斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Luttrel于1523年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲Andrew Luttrell26岁，母亲Lady Margaret Wyndham22岁。她于大约1542年与Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年3月10日在她的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特布陽斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Luttrel was born in 1523, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, Andrew Luttrell, was 26 and her mother, Lady Margaret Wyndham, was 22. She married Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset about 1542, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 March 1566, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Bryanston, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Luttrel est née en 1523, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Andrew Luttrell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Wyndham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset environ 1542, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1566, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Luttrel 1523 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Luttrell 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Wyndham 22. Sie hat um 1542 in England Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. März 1566 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bryanston, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Luttrel è nata il nel 1523 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, sua padre, Andrew Luttrell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Wyndham, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset circa 1542, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1566, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Bryanston, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Luttrelが1523年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Andrew Luttrellは26歳，母Lady Margaret Wyndhamは22歳であった。約1542年にイギリスでRichard Rogers Sheriff of Dorsetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年3月10日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトブリアンストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Luttrel(이)가 1523년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Luttrell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Wyndham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1542년 영국에서 Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 3월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 브라이아스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Luttrel nasceu em 1523, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Andrew Luttrell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Wyndham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset aproximadamente 1542, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1566, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Luttrel родилась в 1523 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Andrew Luttrell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Wyndham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset около 1542 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 марта 1566 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Luttrel nació en 1523, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Andrew Luttrell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Wyndham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Richard Rogers Sheriff of Dorset aproximadamente 1542, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1566, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra.
